task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Quality Assurance' department in the Odoo Departments list or Kanban view.
Look for the 'QA Inspector' job position in the Job Positions list, assigned to the 'Quality Assurance' department.

Look for the 'QA Shift Schedule' in the Working Schedules configuration. It should show working hours from 07:00 to 17:30 for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday only, with no entries for Friday, Saturday, or Sunday.

task_completion.description: Onboard Maria Chen and assign as Department Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Maria Chen's employee profile showing email 'maria.chen@meridianmfg.com', phone '+1 (555) 014-7200', Job Position 'QA Inspector', and Schedule 'QA Shift Schedule'. Also verify she is listed as the Manager of the 'Quality Assurance' department (either on her profile or the department page).

task_completion.description: Onboard James Okafor and assign Maria Chen as Coach
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for James Okafor's employee profile showing email 'james.okafor@meridianmfg.com', phone '+1 (555) 014-7201', Job Position 'QA Inspector', and Schedule 'QA Shift Schedule'. Verify that 'Maria Chen' is selected as his Coach.
Look for Sarah Petrov's employee profile showing email 'sarah.petrov@meridianmfg.com', phone '+1 (555) 014-7202', Job Position 'QA Inspector', and Schedule 'QA Shift Schedule'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web GUI to perform tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface being navigated and forms being filled out, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: No browser developer tools were used to fake the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel should not be visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent actually entered the data into the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate steps like typing in input fields, selecting dropdowns, or saving forms in Odoo.
